lessons.text: When two of three experts converged on forced-seller capitulation (despair tone, faded attention), fading it long worked; the loser chased the SAME despair short and got flushed the other way. DO fade an exhausted-seller extreme; do NOT add to the flush direction once attention has faded.

The winning short faded terminal euphoria (influencer FOMO + surging social attention + recycled narrative) - the crowd had no marginal buyer left. DO take the euphoria-top short when all three experts read greed/euphoria on LATE chasers.

A high-conviction directional read resting on a single source got vetoed by the Auditor and never traded; the winners all cited >=2 sources. Treat a lone-source extreme as un-actionable until a second source confirms.
